text:
## Department Performance Metrics  
| Department | Key Metric | Target | Actual |
|------------|-----------|--------|--------|
| Retail Banking | NPS | 70 | 72 |
| Product Management | New Feature Delivery | 4/quarter | 3/quarter |
| Operations | Account Opening SLA | 95% | 98% |
| Customer Service | First-Call Resolution | 85% | 81% |
| Financial Crime | SAR Timeliness | <30 days | 20 days |
| Compliance | Policy Review Timeliness | 100% | 100% |
| Risk | Capital Ratio | >15% | 18.2% |
| Technology | System Availability | 99.8% | 99.85% |  
---
name: Chunk 100/102

raw_entities.name: Retail Banking
raw_entities.description: A core retail banking department responsible for customer-facing financial services, tracked against Net Promoter Score performance targets.

raw_entities.name: Product Management
raw_entities.description: A department overseeing product development and feature lifecycle, measured against quarterly delivery output targets.

raw_entities.name: Operations
raw_entities.description: An operational unit managing account processing and onboarding workflows, evaluated via service level agreement compliance.

raw_entities.name: Customer Service
raw_entities.description: A frontline support department focused on client assistance, measured on initial contact effectiveness and resolution rates.

raw_entities.name: Financial Crime
raw_entities.description: A specialized compliance and risk unit managing financial crime reporting, specifically tracking the timeliness of Suspicious Activity Reports.
context: Financial Crime | SAR Timeliness | <30 days | 20 days

raw_entities.name: Compliance
raw_entities.description: A governance and regulatory adherence department responsible for policy oversight, review cycles, and internal standard enforcement.

raw_entities.name: Risk
raw_entities.description: A risk management department overseeing capital adequacy, financial stability thresholds, and regulatory capital ratios.

raw_entities.name: Technology
raw_entities.description: An IT and infrastructure department responsible for maintaining system uptime, technical availability standards, and platform reliability.

raw_entities.name: NPS Target
raw_entities.description: A customer loyalty performance metric targeting a Net Promoter Score of 70, with an actual recorded performance of 72.

raw_entities.name: New Feature Delivery Target
raw_entities.description: A product development output metric targeting the delivery of 4 new features per quarter, with an actual rate of 3 per quarter.

raw_entities.name: Account Opening SLA Target
raw_entities.description: An operational service level agreement targeting a 95% completion rate for account openings, achieving an actual performance of 98%.

raw_entities.name: First-Call Resolution Target
raw_entities.description: A customer support effectiveness metric targeting an 85% first-contact resolution rate, with an actual achievement of 81%.

raw_entities.name: SAR Timeliness Target
raw_entities.description: A financial crime reporting threshold targeting Suspicious Activity Report submission within 30 days or less, with an actual average of 20 days.
context: Financial Crime | SAR Timeliness | <30 days | 20 days

raw_entities.name: Policy Review Timeliness Target
raw_entities.description: A compliance oversight metric targeting a 100% on-time policy review completion rate, achieving exactly 100%.

raw_entities.name: Capital Ratio Target
raw_entities.description: A financial stability metric targeting a capital adequacy ratio greater than 15%, with an actual recorded ratio of 18.2%.

raw_entities.name: System Availability Target
raw_entities.description: A technology infrastructure metric targeting 99.8% system uptime, achieving an actual performance of 99.85%.

properties.what_it_measures: Percentage of accounts opened within SLA
Percentage of customer issues resolved on first contact
Maximum days to file Suspicious Activity Report
Percentage of policies reviewed on time

relationships.description: Retail Banking is accountable for tracking and delivering the Net Promoter Score metric to measure customer satisfaction performance.
Product Management is accountable for the rate of new feature delivery, tracking quarterly release velocity against targets.
Operations owns the Service Level Agreement for account opening, ensuring timely processing and compliance with delivery standards.
Customer Service is accountable for resolving customer inquiries on the first contact, measuring support efficiency and effectiveness.
Financial Crime is accountable for the timeliness of Suspicious Activity Report submissions, ensuring regulatory compliance within defined thresholds.
relationships.context: Financial Crime | SAR Timeliness | <30 days | 20 days

relationships.description: Compliance is accountable for the timely review and update of internal policies, maintaining governance standards at 100% completion.
Risk is accountable for monitoring and maintaining the bank's capital ratio, ensuring financial stability and regulatory adherence.
Technology owns the system availability SLA, ensuring IT infrastructure and digital channels meet uptime performance standards.
